_meta.description: rate_limited error with subCode device_cap (edge-case duplicate of websocket/error.rate_limited.json — same payload, listed here to exercise edge-case validation paths). This is the post-auth per-user concurrent-connection cap breach (close code 4003). The subCode device_cap enables the SDK to surface an actionable 'Too many devices signed in' message. Distinct from per-IP rate limit (HTTP 429 on upgrade, no subCode) and REST rate limit (HTTP 429, no subCode).
